ddls:
CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "ticker_symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the company */,
  "security" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Exchange where the company is listed */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector the company belongs to */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industry the company belongs to */,
  "founded_date" TEXT /* Date when the company was founded */,
  "CEO" TEXT /* Name of the current CEO */,
  "HQ_address" TEXT /* Headquarters address */,
  "employees_count" INTEGER /* Number of employees */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* Company's website URL */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_companies_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_companies_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector (e.g., Industrials, Health Care) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sector */,
  "market_capitalization" REAL /* Total market capitalization of the sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry (e.g., Industrial Conglomerates, Pharmaceuticals) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the industry */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector the industry belongs to */,
  "market_capitalization" REAL /* Total market capitalization of the industry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_industries_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock price */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the stock price belongs to */,
  "price_date" TEXT /* Date of the stock price */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening stock price */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest stock price */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest stock price */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing stock price */,
  "adjusted_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price */,
  "dividend" REAL /* Dividend */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of stocks traded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_financials" (
  "financial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial record */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the financial record belongs to */,
  "financial_date" TEXT /* Date of the financial record */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue of the company */,
  "net_income" REAL /* Net income of the company */,
  "cash_flow" REAL /* Cash flow of the company */,
  "gross_profit" REAL /* Gross profit */,
  "operating_income" REAL /* Operating income */,
  "EBITDA" REAL /* Earnings Before Interest, Taxes, Depreciation, and Amortization */,
  "debt" REAL /* Company's debt */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("financial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_financials_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "API_URL" TEXT /* API endpoint URL */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update from the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_price_sources" (
  "price_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock price from a data source */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the stock price belongs to */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source the stock price comes from */,
  "price_date" TEXT /* Date of the stock price */,
  "price" REAL /* Stock price */,
  "price_type" TEXT /* Type of price */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_price_sources_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_price_sources_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_financial_sources" (
  "financial_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company financial record from a data source */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the financial record belongs to */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source the financial record comes from */,
  "financial_date" TEXT /* Date of the financial record */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue of the company */,
  "net_income" REAL /* Net income of the company */,
  "cash_flow" REAL /* Cash flow of the company */,
  "financial_type" TEXT /* Type of financial data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("financial_source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_financial_sources_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_financial_sources_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, portfolio manager, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* User's password (hashed and salted) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Account status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analyses" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the analysis */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company being analyzed */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date of the analysis */,
  "results" TEXT /* Results of the analysis */,
  "visibility" TEXT /* Visibility level of the analysis */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyses_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyses_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the news article is related to */,
  "news_date" TEXT /* Date of the news article */,
  "headline" TEXT /* Headline of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "press_releases" (
  "release_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each press release */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the press release comes from */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date of the press release */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the press release */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the press release */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the press release */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("release_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_press_releases_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock exchange */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the stock exchange */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the stock exchange is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industry_classifications" (
  "classification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry classification */,
  "classification_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry classification */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the industry classification */,
  "classification_type" TEXT /* Type of classification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("classification_id")
)
